title: The Better Biomes And Plants Mod
description: It adds nice Biomes and other cool stuff to the game
body:
This mod Adds:

New Biomes like **The Bluewood Forest** that has blue wood (how could you imagine?) and **The Lemon Forest** with new food!

And Cars which you can drive too... why in the forking world are there cars??? That doesn't makes any sense!?
Whatever... I hope you'll enjoy this mod.

More Biomes will come soon to this mod!
I hope you'll enjoy exploring new biomes in this mod!
